feed.title: PawSwipe pet bandana guides
feed.subtitle: Practical, measurement-led pet bandana guides and PawSwipe launch updates.

entry.title: Cat bandana guide: size, safety, and supervised use
entry.summary: Compare the verified 44, 54, and 64 cm squares and review supervised accessory use for cats.

entry.title: Tie-on dog bandana vs. over-collar styles
entry.summary: Understand how tie-on squares and over-collar bandanas differ before choosing.

entry.title: How to tie a dog bandana
entry.summary: Fold, tie, check two-finger space, and keep supervised accessory use separate from restraint.

entry.title: How to measure a pet for a bandana
entry.summary: Compare a comfortable square your pet already wears instead of trusting a non-universal size label.

entry.title: Dog bandana size chart: S, M, or L?
entry.summary: Compare verified S, M, and L square measurements in inches and centimetres.

entry.title: Pet bandana with original cat-and-dog print
entry.summary: Meet the pre-launch PawSwipe Pet Parade bandana and review verified product details before ordering opens.
